svg.title: Jiajia v4 reference tracing underlay
svg.desc: Tracing underlay assembled from the v4 polished reference. Draw final Rive vector parts over these images; do not use the unlike polished-master SVG as art direction.
svg.text: Jiajia v4 reference tracing underlay: trace these proportions first, then enforce top-wire-arm-only cleanup.
Visual source of truth = v7/v4 PNG. Existing polished-master SVG is only a naming/layer experiment.
